subtitles.original: Wow マジ gorgeous, thanks
subtitles.english: Wow, you're seriously gorgeous, thanks!

subtitles.original: You look so badass
subtitles.english: You look so badass!

subtitles.original: Scream, scream, scream and shout ay
subtitles.english: Scream, scream, scream and shout, ay!

subtitles.original: Wow マジ gorgeous, thanks
subtitles.english: Wow, you're seriously gorgeous, thanks!

subtitles.original: You look so badass
subtitles.english: You look so badass!

subtitles.original: Scream, scream, scream and shout ay
subtitles.english: Scream, scream, scream and shout, ay!

subtitles.original: Turn it up now let go
subtitles.english: Turn it up now, let's go!

subtitles.original: Me and my girls, me and my girls
subtitles.english: Me and my girls, me and my girls

subtitles.original: 見てよ we're amazing, we are so amazing
subtitles.english: Look, we're amazing, we are so amazing!

subtitles.original: Me and my girls, me and my girls
subtitles.english: Me and my girls, me and my girls

subtitles.original: ここから dive
subtitles.english: Diving from right here...

subtitles.original: Yes, I'm a hot queen
subtitles.english: Yes, I'm a hot queen!

subtitles.original: Dive, let's deep dive, I wanna deep dive
subtitles.english: Dive, let's deep dive, I wanna deep dive!

subtitles.original: みんな！ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Everyone! Thank you!

subtitles.original: はあ、みんなありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: Phew, thank you so much, everyone!

subtitles.original: それでは、今回のライブに携わってくださった方をご紹介していきたいと思います！
subtitles.english: Now, I'd like to introduce the people who helped out with this live concert!

subtitles.original: まずはダンサー！夢にゃん！
subtitles.english: First, the dancers! Yumenyan!

subtitles.original: で、ちおりゃん！
subtitles.english: And Chiorian!

subtitles.original: う、みなみゃん！
subtitles.english: And Minamiyan!

subtitles.original: と、そら！
subtitles.english: And Sora!

subtitles.original: ありがとう！そして
subtitles.english: Thank you! And also...

subtitles.original: この場にはいないんですけど、振付師のMiU Kinoshita先生！
subtitles.english: Though they aren't here right now, our choreographer MiU Kinoshita-sensei!

subtitles.original: タップのAYAKA先生！
subtitles.english: Tap dance instructor AYAKA-sensei!

subtitles.original: で、ポッピンのTO-Y先生！
subtitles.english: And pop dance instructor TO-Y-sensei!

subtitles.original: ダンス監修、YUKA先生！
subtitles.english: Dance supervisor YUKA-sensei!

subtitles.original: ボーカル監修、MARIA先生！
subtitles.english: Vocal supervisor MARIA-sensei!

subtitles.original: そしてゲストにお越しいただきました
subtitles.english: And we also had special guests join us...

subtitles.original: 胡桃ちよちゃん！
subtitles.english: Kurumi Chiyo-chan!

subtitles.original: ハコトベーンズちゃん！
subtitles.english: Hakotobeanzu-chan!

subtitles.original: 伊咲りおなちゃん！
subtitles.english: Izaki Riona-chan!

subtitles.original: 水宮つうちゃん！
subtitles.english: Mizumiya Tsuu-chan!

subtitles.original: 本当にありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: Thank you all so much!

subtitles.original: そして、今見えない中で稼働してくださってるスタッフの皆さん！
subtitles.english: And to all the staff working hard behind the scenes where we can't see!

subtitles.original: そして、はじめの目の前にいてくれてる、観てくれた皆様、本当にありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: And to everyone right here in front of Hajime, and everyone who watched, thank you so much!

subtitles.original: それでは、ちょっと新曲について詳しくご紹介したいなと思います！改めてタイトルは、Deep Dive！
subtitles.english: Now, I'd like to share some details about my new song! Once again, the title is \"Deep Dive\"!

subtitles.original: はい、MV公開はこの配信のすぐ後です！
subtitles.english: Yes, the MV will be released right after this stream!

subtitles.original: 音源リリースは本日24時からになります！
subtitles.english: The audio track will be released starting tonight at 24:00!

subtitles.original: 皆さんたくさん聴いていただけると嬉しいです！
subtitles.english: I hope you all listen to it a lot!

subtitles.original: さあ、それではここで重大発表をいきたいと思います！
subtitles.english: Now, I'd like to make a major announcement!

subtitles.original: こちらの動画をご覧ください！
subtitles.english: Please take a look at this video!

subtitles.original: 轟はじめ × FILA
subtitles.english: Todoroki Hajime x FILA

subtitles.original: コラボ決定!!
subtitles.english: Collaboration Decided!!

subtitles.original: COMING SOON!!
subtitles.english: Coming Soon!!

subtitles.original: わあ、凄い！この度、はじめとFILAさんのコラボが決定しました！
subtitles.english: Wow, amazing! This time, a collaboration between Hajime and FILA has been decided!

subtitles.original: うわ、嬉しい！ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Oh, I'm so happy! Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: そして、なんとスニーカーを含むアパレルをプロデュースさせていただきました！
subtitles.english: And, what's more, I got to produce apparel including sneakers!

subtitles.original: やったー！
subtitles.english: Yay!

subtitles.original: はじめっぽいカラーリングを取り入れながら、男性でも女性でも似合うように意識してデザインしてみました！
subtitles.english: While incorporating colors that feel like Hajime, I designed them focusing on making them look good on both men and women!

subtitles.original: 一足目、はじめのこだわりを詰め込んだスニーカーにしていくので、続報を楽しみに待っていてください！
subtitles.english: For the first pair, I'll be packing them with Hajime's personal touches, so please look forward to more updates!

subtitles.original: そして、今回なんとあのスニーカーだけじゃなくてですね、ジャージとTシャツとキャップもプロデュースしちゃいました！
subtitles.english: And, not only the sneakers this time, but I also produced jerseys, T-shirts, and caps!

subtitles.original: さらにコラボに当たって、オリジナルのコラボロゴをFILAさんと作りました！ドドン！
subtitles.english: Furthermore, for this collaboration, I created an original collab logo with FILA! Ta-da!

subtitles.original: わあ、可愛い！
subtitles.english: Wow, so cute!

subtitles.original: 実はこのね、ロゴFILAさんと一緒に打ち合わせをして考えました、はじめ。
subtitles.english: Actually, Hajime held meetings with FILA to come up with this logo.

subtitles.original: あ、こう、こういう感じにね、実際にこう手書きをしながら打ち合わせをして、どの色いいかなって、いろんな色味を出してもらって、これにしました！
subtitles.english: Yes, we had meetings while doing hand-drawings like this, discussing which colors would look best, and they showed me various color palettes to choose from before we settled on this!

subtitles.original: ひと目でね、もうはじめだってわかる、こう、ミニ番長のシルエットがいいかなと思って入れてみました！
subtitles.english: I thought it'd be great to have a silhouette of Mini Bancho so you can recognize it's Hajime at a glance, so we put it in!

subtitles.original: このロゴがね、コラボの商品にも付きます！楽しみにしてほしいにゃあ！
subtitles.english: This logo will also be on the collaboration products! Please look forward to it!

subtitles.original: 実はね、アパレル以外にもFILAさんとのコラボ商品が出ますので、皆さん詳細な情報が出るの、ぜひお楽しみに、お待ちください！
subtitles.english: Actually, besides apparel, there will be other collaboration products with FILA, so please look forward to the detailed information when it comes out!

subtitles.original: この後ですね、メンバー限定アンコールライブ、21時15分からありますし、
subtitles.english: After this, there will be a members-only encore live starting at 21:15,

subtitles.original: この新曲についてもいろいろ詳しく見ていければと思いますので、ぜひまだの方はチャンネル登録と通知をオンにしてメンバーも入っていただけると、アンコールも一緒に楽しめてハッピーだなと思います！
subtitles.english: I also want to go over details about the new song with you all, so if you haven't yet, please subscribe, turn on notifications, and join the membership. We can enjoy the encore together and be happy!

subtitles.original: おさらいをすると、新曲MVこの後すぐ公開、ええ、21時からグッズ販売、21時15分からアンコールライブ、24時新曲音源リリースです！
subtitles.english: To recap: the new song's MV is released right after this, merchandise sales start at 21:00, the encore live is at 21:15, and the new song's audio track releases at 24:00!

subtitles.original: ありがとうにゃん！
subtitles.english: Thank you!

subtitles.original: それでは、メンバー限定アンコールライブでお会いしましょう！バイバーイ！
subtitles.english: Well then, let's meet at the members-only encore live! Bye-bye!

subtitles.original: いっぱいコメントありがとう！嬉しかった！
subtitles.english: Thank you for all the comments! I was so happy!

responses.thoughts:
**My Subtitle Strategy**

Alright, let's break this down. The core task is context-aware English subtitles from a video stream, precisely synchronized, from the start at 00:00 to approximately 04:59. The format needs to be JSON, delivered via `default_api:final_result`. The rules are straightforward: timecodes matter, vocal activation is the gold standard for time alignment, translation is key, no CC tags, and manual handling of speech post-00:44 because there's no reference JSON.

The first step is meticulously analyzing the video. For the initial section (00:00 - 00:44), it’s a music performance – "Deep Dive" by Todoroki Hajime, with dancers. The priority is accurate vocal start and end times, and precise lyrics transcription with timecodes. I listened closely and transcribed the lyrics.

From 00:44 to the end, it’s Hajime speaking. This necessitates manual Japanese transcription, followed by translation. I transcribed the Japanese speech in detail and checked the names of the people mentioned, like dancers and teachers.

The goal is to refine the timecodes down to the millisecond, which is crucial for proper synchronization. Each line's start and end times have been reviewed, and the translations have been made accurate and concise.

I've also made a format check and removed CC tags. The output will be well-formatted, line length will be respected and accurate. Now, it's just about packaging this precisely to the required JSON output.
